name: libsbuild-perl
title: libsbuild-perl
summary: Library for building Debian binary packages from Debian sources
description:
Library for building Debian binary packages from Debian sources
The sbuild suite of programs (wanna-build, buildd and sbuild) are
used to build binary packages from source packages.  The wanna-build
database tracks packages which require building; buildd schedules
work from information it gets from the wanna-build database; sbuild
does the actual package building.
.
This package contains the core library modules used by these
programs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsbuild-perl because Library for building Debian binary packages from Debian sources.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsbuild-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsbuild-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsbuild-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
